strategy: One deduplicated United States animal catalog with 50-state plus District of Columbia observation membership and nine broad product regions
limitations: State and region membership reflects research-grade iNaturalist observations with photos, not a hard biological range boundary.
A one-observation minimum intentionally retains rare, introduced, and vagrant species; geography must be used only as a soft ranking signal.
The nine product regions are friendly UI groupings over state membership, not ecological regions.
Territories are deferred from the first membership definition rather than silently assigned to a mainland region.
Embedding generation, float16 parity, expanded-catalog accuracy, and iPhone performance remain separate promotion gates.
